name: China Electronics Holdings, Inc.
summary: China Electronics Holdings, Inc., through its subsidiaries, engages in the retail and wholesale of consumer electronics and appliances in the People's Republic of China. It offers solar heaters, refrigerators, air conditioners, televisions, and related products. The company also manufactures and sells private label brand refrigerators. As of September 30, 2014, it operated 1 company-owned store; and 141 exclusive franchise stores under the Guoying brand name, and 16 non-exclusive franchise stores in rural markets in Anhui Province. The company was formerly known as Buyonate, Inc. China Electronics Holdings, Inc. was founded in 2002 and is based in Lu'an, China.
